files./projects/nmapper/README.md:
# nmapper
A Python wrapper around Nmap with clean JSON output and port diffing.
GitHub: github.com/shuva-kharel/nmapper
files./projects/nmapper/demo.sh:
#!/bin/bash
# Quick demo of nmapper
python3 nmapper.py --target scanme.nmap.org --json out.json
python3 nmapper.py --diff old.json out.json
files./projects/phishdetect/README.md:
# PhishDetect
ML-based phishing URL detector. Trained on 50k URLs. 94% accuracy.
GitHub: github.com/shuva-kharel/phishdetect
files./projects/phishdetect/model.py:
# PhishDetect - feature extraction stub
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestClassifier

def extract_features(url: str) -> list[float]:
    return [len(url), url.count('-'), url.count('.'), int('@' in url)]

clf = RandomForestClassifier(n_estimators=200)
files./projects/keylogger-edu/README.md:
# keylogger-edu
Educational keylogger with encrypted log storage.
For learning only. Never deployed against anyone.
GitHub: github.com/shuva-kharel/keylogger-edu
files./writeups/htb-lame.md:
# HTB: Lame
Exploited Samba 3.0.20 via CVE-2007-2447 using Metasploit.
User: daemon | Root: root
files./writeups/thm-relevant.md:
# THM: Relevant
Uploaded an aspx reverse shell via an anonymous SMB share,
then escalated from iis apppool to SYSTEM with PrintSpoofer.
User + Root flags captured.

# Google Cybersecurity Professional Certificate
Issuer : Google / Coursera
Issued : 2023
8 courses covering SIEM, Linux, SQL, Python, and incident response.
files./secret/flag.txt:
Almost. The flag needs a key.
Try XOR with 0x42.
Encrypted: 01160439307176261d362a711d3172373021711d2e3729713f

When you've decoded it, submit with:
  flag CTF{...}
files./secret/.note:
flag format: CTF{...}
Decode the hex in flag.txt, XOR each byte with 0x42.

quotes: The quieter you become, the more you can hear.
Security is a process, not a product.
There are two types of companies: those hacked, and those who don't know it yet.
Amateurs hack systems. Professionals hack people.
Privacy is not something I'm merely entitled to, it's an absolute prerequisite.
The best defense is knowing how to attack.
Root is not a privilege, it's a responsibility.
If you know the enemy and know yourself, you need not fear the result of a hundred battles.

quotes: The quieter you become, the more you can hear. вҖ” Kali motto
There are two types of companies: those that have been hacked and those who don't know it. вҖ” John Chambers
Security is not a product, but a process. вҖ” Bruce Schneier
If you think technology can solve your security problems, then you don't understand the problems. вҖ” Bruce Schneier
The only truly secure system is one that is powered off, cast in a block of concrete and sealed in a lead-lined room. вҖ” Gene Spafford
Amateurs hack systems, professionals hack people. вҖ” Bruce Schneier
Hackers are breaking the systems for profit. Before, it was about intellectual curiosity. вҖ” Kevin Mitnick
Being able to break security doesn't make you a hacker any more than being able to hotwire a car makes you an automotive engineer.
Privacy is not something that I'm merely entitled to, it's an absolute prerequisite. вҖ” Marlon Brando
The internet is the world's largest library. It's just that all the books are on the floor. вҖ” John Allen Paulos
